subcodes.first_line: It is submitted that the noble missive, which indicated the well-being of thy blessed person, arrived like unto an Egyptian herald bearing glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عرض میشود رقیمه کریمه عالی که مشعر بر صحت وجود مبارک بود مثل بشیر مصری مبشر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mystical themes, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @development of capacity and readiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
